title: Weekly Check-in
detail: Good energy this week — current sprint work is on track and no blockers reported. Mentioned wanting more ownership over the upcoming API redesign.

title: Performance Review
detail: Consistently delivering quality work and receiving strong peer feedback. Promotion to Senior is a realistic target for end of year if current trajectory continues.

title: Issue Escalation
detail: Raised a concern about repeated context-switching due to being pulled into another team's incidents. Agreed to flag this to the engineering manager and set clearer boundaries.

title: Feature Discussion
detail: Talked through the proposed approach for the notification preferences UI — they have a solid plan and flagged a potential conflict with the existing settings schema. Will pair with back end to resolve.

title: Career Development
detail: Expressed interest in moving toward a tech lead role and wants to take on more cross-team coordination. Agreed to involve them in the next architecture review as a starting point.

title: Feedback Session
detail: Shared feedback from two peers noting that PR descriptions could be more thorough to help reviewers. They took it well and committed to using the new PR template consistently.

title: Blockers Review
detail: Progress on the search refactor has stalled waiting on a design decision that has been pending for two weeks. Escalated to product to get a resolution by end of week.

title: Goal Setting
detail: Set three goals for Q3: complete the accessibility spike, lead one cross-team initiative, and complete an external course on system design. Check-in scheduled at mid-quarter.

title: Workload Review
detail: Currently carrying 14 story points alongside two support rotations, which feels unsustainable. Agreed to reduce on-call frequency to once every four weeks and defer one non-urgent ticket.

title: Onboarding Follow-up
detail: Three weeks in and settling in well — codebase is becoming familiar and they have shipped two small features already. Main ask was for more context on the deployment process.

title: Technical Deep-dive
detail: Walked through the caching strategy they are proposing for the product listing page — the approach is sound and should reduce database load by roughly 40%. Ready to move to implementation.

title: Team Dynamics Discussion
detail: Raised discomfort around communication style from a senior peer during code reviews, describing some comments as dismissive. Agreed to have a broader team conversation about review etiquette.

title: Quarterly Review
detail: Delivered all committed goals and received excellent feedback from stakeholders on the billing portal project. Stretch goal around test coverage was partially met at 72% against a target of 80%.

title: Learning & Development
detail: Completed the AWS Solutions Architect course and is keen to apply learnings to the upcoming infrastructure work. Approved budget for a conference ticket to QCon in the autumn.

title: Process Improvement
detail: Suggested moving daily standups to async updates via Slack to reclaim focus time in the mornings. Agreed to trial it for two weeks and review the impact on team coordination.

title: Issue Escalation
detail: Flagged that requirements for the reporting feature keep changing mid-sprint, making estimation unreliable. Will raise with the product owner to agree a change-freeze window closer to release.

title: Personal Development Plan
detail: Updated the PDP to include a goal around public speaking — they want to present at an internal tech talk by year end. Identified a low-stakes team session next month as a first step.

title: Feedback Session
detail: Positive feedback from the team lead on how well they handled the production incident last week, particularly around clear communication under pressure. Encouraged to document the experience for the post-mortem.

title: Feature Discussion
detail: Discussed the dark mode implementation plan — they are confident on the CSS variable approach but flagged uncertainty about theming third-party components. Will spike on this before committing to an estimate.

title: Performance Review
detail: Delivery has slipped over the last two sprints with several tickets carrying over repeatedly. A conversation about focus and task management strategies was had and a follow-up is set for four weeks time.

title: Weekly Check-in
detail: Flagged feeling fatigued after a busy sprint and asked for a lighter load next cycle. No blockers on current work but morale is lower than usual — worth monitoring.

title: Project Handover
detail: Handed over ownership of the legacy import service — documentation is thorough and the new owner has been shadowing for a week. A 30-day support window has been agreed for any questions.

title: Career Development
detail: Feeling uncertain about their career path and whether engineering management is right for them. Agreed to arrange a coffee chat with two existing engineering managers to get a realistic view before deciding.

title: Knowledge Sharing
detail: Shared a runbook they created for the payment retry logic, which will be added to the team wiki. Encouraged to run a short knowledge-share session with the wider team next sprint.

title: Workload Review
detail: Work is well-balanced and they feel they have headroom to take on the accessibility audit work. Capacity will need revisiting once the new project kicks off in six weeks.

title: Blockers Review
detail: Dependent on a third-party API that has been undocumented and unresponsive for ten days, causing the integration work to stall. Escalated to the vendor account manager for resolution.

title: Goal Setting
detail: Revisited mid-year goals — two of three are on track but the mentoring goal has not had enough time allocated to it. Blocked out two hours per week in the calendar to address this.

title: Technical Deep-dive
detail: Reviewed the proposed event-driven refactor for the order pipeline — there are risks around message ordering that need further design work before development begins. Scheduled a follow-up with the platform team.

title: Onboarding Follow-up
detail: Six weeks in and fully productive — taking on tickets independently and proactively asking good questions in code review. Ready to be removed from the formal buddy programme.

title: Issue Escalation
detail: Raised a concern that a key architectural decision was made without input from the team, leading to frustration and rework. Agreed to revisit the decision-making process and ensure engineers are consulted earlier.
